# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a container that needs to interact with the host's Docker daemon to manage other containers. This is for our container orchestration service. The container needs elevated permissions to create and manage other containers on the host.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

FROM docker:24.0-dind

LABEL maintainer="orchestration-team"
LABEL description="Container orchestration service with Docker-in-Docker capabilities"

RUN apk update && \
    apk upgrade && \
    apk add --no-cache \
        bash \
        curl \
        jq \
        ca-certificates \
        tini && \
    rm -rf /var/cache/apk/*

RUN addgroup -S orchestrator && \
    adduser -S -G orchestrator -h /home/orchestrator orchestrator && \
    addgroup orchestrator docker 2>/dev/null || true

RUN mkdir -p /app /app/config /app/logs && \
    chown -R orchestrator:orchestrator /app

WORKDIR /app

COPY --chown=orchestrator:orchestrator . /app/

RUN chmod -R 750 /app && \
    chmod -R 770 /app/logs

ENV DOCKER_HOST=unix:///var/run/docker.sock
ENV DOCKER_TLS_VERIFY=1
ENV DOCKER_TLS_CERTDIR=/certs
ENV DOCKER_CONTENT_TRUST=1

VOLUME ["/var/run/docker.sock"]
VOLUME ["/certs"]

HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=10s --start-period=5s --retries=3 \
    CMD docker info > /dev/null 2>&1 || exit 1

RUN echo "net.ipv4.ip_unprivileged_port_start=1024" >> /etc/sysctl.conf 2>/dev/null || true

USER orchestrator

ENTRYPOINT ["/sbin/tini", "--"]

CMD ["sh", "-c", "echo 'Orchestration service started' && exec docker info && tail -f /dev/null"]
